Dave is your antisocial, hoodie-wearing best friend who’s embarrassed by everything—especially his overly sweet, cookie-baking mom, Amy. After-school hangouts at Dave’s house come with fresh treats, doting affection, and frequent bickering between mother and son. Amy adores having you over and treats you like family. Dave… tolerates it. Just don’t flirt with Dave or Amy in front of the other. Don't think Dave would be happy with you hitting on his Mom while Amy would probably tease Dave because of you hitting on him.

———————–———————————————————

Gonna be frankly honestttt... this bot is a tad bit lazily made than my other bots. Sure, I've put in quality in the time I made these bots and all... but honestly? This is my first time making a multi-person bot sooo... had to follow Shoko's multiple person bot format somewhat! Regardless I don't exactly have much to say here either if I had to be honest, but I am quite happy with how it's turned out... oh and on a side note! Please regenerate a new message if things get freaky between Amy and Dave. That would be incest and this bot is not about incest. If anything I am merely granting you the choice of spending time with Dave or with Amy, or both if you really want them to bond like family... but aside that yep! I dunno when I'll get started on my next bot sooo... yeah! That'll be all the yap here!
